meta.title: PeppaBlog
meta.description: A personal publishing platform for thoughtful essays, product notes, and engineering writing.

auth.loginDescription: Use your Supabase account to access protected routes and the dashboard foundation.
auth.resetDescription: Request a recovery link to securely reset your password.
auth.updatePasswordDescription: Set a new password for your account after opening the recovery link.
auth.setupMissingDescription: Create a .env.local file and provide the variables below, then restart the development server before trying to sign in again.

errors.missingSupabaseEnv: Supabase environment variables are missing. Complete the local setup and restart the app.
errors.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.resetRequestFailed: The recovery email could not be sent. Please try again.
errors.passwordTooShort: Choose a password with at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.
errors.passwordUpdateFailed: The password could not be updated. Please try again.

feedback.resetRequestSent: If the email exists, a recovery link has been sent.

home.description: A calm place for product ideas, engineering notes, and long-form writing worth revisiting.

blog.indexDescription: Browse published stories, explore ideas by category or tag, and move through the archive with a cleaner reading flow.
blog.emptyState: No published posts are available yet. Publish the first story to bring PeppaBlog to life.
blog.activeFiltersLabel: Switch categories or tags without leaving this view.

content.title: Post management
content.descriptionElevated: You can manage draft and published content across the workspace and inspect revision history before shipping updates.
content.descriptionAuthor: You can create and maintain your own drafts here, then publish them once the post content is ready.
content.emptyState: No manageable posts are available yet. Generate demo posts or create your first draft to begin.
content.noRevisionSummary: No summary was recorded for this revision.
content.noRevisions: No revisions have been recorded yet.

fields.coverImageEmpty: Leave the post without a cover image.
fields.changeSummaryPlaceholder: Describe what changed in this revision
fields.title: Title

editor.linkPrompt: Enter a URL. Leave empty to remove the link.
editor.imageDialogEmpty: No matching media is available yet.
editor.uploadZoneDescription: Drag images or videos here, or choose files to upload and insert them directly into the post.

feedback.demoCreated: Sample posts were generated for your account.
feedback.demoExists: Sample posts already exist for your account.

errors.invalidStatus: The selected post status is invalid.
errors.incompletePublishedTranslations: Published posts need a title, slug, and content.
errors.missingPublishDate: Scheduled posts need a publish date.
errors.saveFailed: The post could not be saved. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: The post could not be deleted. Please try again.
errors.demoFailed: Sample content could not be generated. Please try again.
errors.postNotFound: The requested post could not be found or is not accessible.

dashboard.title: Account dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor your account, review publishing setup, and move between the core parts of the PeppaBlog workspace.

profile.title: Profile details
profile.description: Manage the account identity used across the PeppaBlog publishing workspace.

admin.title: Presentation management
admin.description: Manage PeppaBlog branding, default locale, theme presets, and the presentation system from one admin workspace.

feedback.themeActivated: The active theme was updated successfully.

errors.saveFailed: The site settings could not be saved. Please try again.
errors.themeIncomplete: Complete every theme token before saving the preset.
errors.themeSaveFailed: The theme tokens could not be saved. Please try again.
errors.themeActivateFailed: The active theme could not be updated. Please try again.

media.title: Media library
media.description: Upload, describe, replace, and remove shared image or video assets for the PeppaBlog publishing workflow.
media.emptyState: No media assets are available yet. Upload an image or video to start building the shared library.

feedback.uploaded: The media file was uploaded successfully.
feedback.updated: The media text was updated successfully.
feedback.replaced: The media file was replaced successfully.
feedback.deleted: The media asset was deleted successfully.

errors.invalidImage: Choose a valid image or video file before submitting.
errors.uploadFailed: The media upload failed. Please try again.
errors.updateFailed: The media text could not be saved. Please try again.
errors.replaceFailed: The media file could not be replaced. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: The media asset could not be deleted. Please try again.

comments.title: Comment moderation
comments.description: Review pending discussion, approve thoughtful replies, and keep PeppaBlog conversations healthy before they go live.
comments.emptyState: No comments match the current moderation filter.

feedback.statusUpdated: The comment status was updated successfully.

errors.statusUpdateFailed: The comment status could not be updated. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: The comment could not be deleted. Please try again.
